description: Use Ralph Loop to review the PDF_Editor project and ensure it can replace full text in PDF files while preserving structure.

tasks.title: Review PDF_Editor Codebase
tasks.description: Analyze the entire PDF_Editor project to understand its structure, functionality, and limitations.
criteria: Identify all core modules and their responsibilities
Understand the current text replacement capabilities
Document any limitations in preserving PDF structure

tasks.title: Test Full Text Replacement in PDFs
tasks.description: Ensure the PDF_Editor can replace full text in PDF files located in ./pdfs while preserving structure.
criteria: Successfully replace text in all PDFs in ./pdfs directory
Preserve original PDF structure (layout, fonts, images)
Only modify text content as specified

tasks.title: Validate Structure Preservation
tasks.description: Verify that PDF structure is preserved unless the original text is modified.
criteria: Compare original and modified PDFs to ensure structure integrity
Confirm that only specified text changes are applied
Document any edge cases or failures

tasks.title: Iterate Until Success
tasks.description: Continue testing and refining until all PDFs in ./pdfs can be processed successfully.
criteria: All PDFs in ./pdfs are processed without errors
Text replacement works as expected in all cases
Structure preservation is maintained across all files

tasks.title: Fix Font and Alignment Issues
tasks.description: Ensure text replacement preserves original font and alignment properties.
criteria: Font family and size are preserved in replaced text
Text alignment matches original document
Line spacing and positioning are maintained

tasks.title: Unify All Interfaces and Engines
tasks.description: Ensure all interfaces (GUI, TUI, CLI) use the same core engine and functionality.
criteria: All interfaces use the same PDF editing engine
Consistent functionality across GUI, TUI, and CLI
Same text replacement methods available in all interfaces
Unified error handling and user feedback

tasks.title: Comprehensive Testing of All Interfaces
tasks.description: Test all interfaces to ensure they work correctly with the same options and engines.
criteria: Test CLI interface with all 7 methods on sample PDFs
Test GUI interface with all 7 methods on sample PDFs
Test TUI interface with all 7 methods on sample PDFs
Verify consistent results across all interfaces
Test batch processing with all methods
Document any discrepancies or issues found
